//: PIM Manager WORKLOAD-BINDING exemptions (Delegation Map reconciliation).
//2: PIM-Assignments-Workloads row that is NOT live in the crawl shows as
//3: 'missing' on the Delegation Map -- UNLESS an ACTIVE exemption excuses it,
//4: in which case it shows as 'exempted'. Mirrors the exemptions model:
//5: reason REQUIRED; expiresOn REQUIRED unless noExpiry:true (never indefinite
//6: by default). An EXPIRED exemption stops excusing -- the binding resurfaces
//7: as 'missing' and re-enters the next reconcile. Match keys: workload + role
//8: must match (case-insensitive); groupTag/scope match only when specified
//9: (omit = any). An entry with neither workload nor role is ignored (too broad).

exemptions.reason: Defender Unified RBAC custom role pending creation in this tenant's change window; binding deferred.
Read-only Intune delegation is managed manually in this tenant outside the PIM model.
